basic_details.organization_name: ICAR Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI)
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) has released the official Young Professional II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR IVRI Young Professional II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 45 years with a Post Graduate degree in Life Science, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Molecular Biology, or Biochemistry, or a Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/ Technology, Animal Science, or Veterinary Science can attend the walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR-IVRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR-IVRI Young Professional II Job 2026 Notification PDF

ICAR IVRI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ICAR IVRI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-IVRI Young Professional II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the ICAR-IVRI Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ICAR-IVRI Young Professional II post is scheduled for 23 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a Post Graduate degree in Life Science/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Molecular Biology/Biochemistry, or a Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/Technology (including all Agriculture & allied sciences, Animal Science, Veterinary science).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional II position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this position is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of your educational certificates, ID proof, and any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh - 243122.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job for the position of Young Professional II.
